source_name: Open-Meteo daily historical weather for Chile locations
possible_target_relationship: rain, storms, wind and temperature may affect collision frequency and repair demand
usefulness_reason: The source can be materialised at daily level and aggregated to month, which matches the forecasting grain. Weather also has a plausible relationship with collision frequency.
known_limitations: Requires coordinates for each forecast region; aggregate daily observations to monthly features.

possible_target_relationship: holidays and working days may affect driving patterns and repair-shop activity
usefulness_reason: The source is date-level, easy to aggregate to month, and joins cleanly to monthly forecasts. It is useful for explaining working-day and holiday effects.
known_limitations: National holiday calendar; local/regional exceptions may need extra handling.

source_name: CONASET monthly collision, casualty, day and hour signals
possible_target_relationship: monthly collision volume and timing mix drive collision-part repair demand
usefulness_reason: True monthly counts plus weekend, night and peak-hour shares replace repeated annual context.
known_limitations: Three official workbooks are combined and refreshed annually; use the publication-aware bridge.

source_name: ANAC Suzuki monthly model registrations and fleet-age proxy
file_path: D:\Lumpy_Fellas-\Inchscape Repo\data\external\External source files\ANAC monthly market reports
possible_target_relationship: Suzuki model sales and fleet age allocate demand to model-linked parts
usefulness_reason: Monthly model units and an age-weighted installed-fleet proxy.
known_limitations: Top-20 coverage is partial and SKU-model matching is incomplete.
target_model_use: publication-safe monthly regressor and SKU allocation context

source_name: MOP Vialidad monthly vehicle passages with INE transport context
file_path: D:\Lumpy_Fellas-\Inchscape Repo\data\external\External source files\MOP monthly traffic
possible_target_relationship: light and heavy vehicle passages proxy kilometres driven and parts exposure
usefulness_reason: Observed monthly traffic is the strongest incremental vehicle-activity signal in the check.
known_limitations: Selected stations; missing and invalid source months are handled by QA rules.

source_name: CMF insured vehicle damage and repair activity
possible_target_relationship: damaged insured vehicles and repair delay connect accidents to repair workload
usefulness_reason: Published insured-damage aggregates provide direct repair-activity context.
